tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold + Python tooling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create empty plugin directory layout and Python package skeleton.

**Files:** plugin dirs, mcp-server/pyproject.toml, __init__.py, conftest.py, .gitignore, README.md.

**Verify:** `cd mcp-server && pytest --collect-only` -> exit 0, "collected 0 items".

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/pyproject.toml","mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/__init__.py","mcp-server/tests/conftest.py",".gitignore","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"cd mcp-server && pytest --collect-only","acceptanceCriteria":["directory layout per File Map","pyproject declares deps","pip install -e mcp-server[dev] succeeds","pytest --collect-only exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Plugin manifest + .mcp.json registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make plugin installable by Claude Code; register the agentic-graph stdio MCP server.

**Files:** .claude-plugin/plugin.json, .mcp.json.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".claude-plugin/plugin.json",".mcp.json"],"verifyCommand":"python -c \"import json; json.load(open('.claude-plugin/plugin.json')); json.load(open('.mcp.json')); print('ok')\"","acceptanceCriteria":["plugin.json validates JSON with name/version/description/author","mcp.json registers stdio server pointed at agentic-mcp"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SQLite schema + DB init
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full graph DDL (14 entity tables, relations table with CHECK constraint, indexes) and db.py with init_db. Phase 0 uses pure SQLite — sqlite-vec / vec0 deferred to Phase 3.

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/schema.sql, db.py, tests/test_db.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/schema.sql","mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/db.py","mcp-server/tests/test_db.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_db.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["14 entity tables present","relations CHECK constraint enforces 9 valid types","init_db idempotent","schema is pure SQLite (no extensions)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Entity CRUD - create_node, update_node, get_node
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Typed Python API for create/update/get of any of 14 entity types with auto-timestamps and required-field validation.

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/nodes.py, tests/test_nodes.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/nodes.py","mcp-server/tests/test_nodes.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_nodes.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["create_node returns id auto-filled timestamps","required fields validated","type-specific extras (Spec/Finding/File/Retro/Review) handled","update bumps last_touched","round-trip all 14 types"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Relations - link_nodes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** link_nodes for the 9 valid relation types + neighbors query (in/out direction).

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/relations.py, tests/test_relations.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/relations.py","mcp-server/tests/test_relations.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_relations.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["link_nodes inserts row","unknown relation rejected","idempotent on duplicate","neighbors out/in both directions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Queries - query_graph + targeted reads
tasks.description:
**Goal:** query_graph (filtered), get_required_reads (spec->nodes), walk_down (hierarchical traversal).

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/queries.py, tests/test_queries.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/queries.py","mcp-server/tests/test_queries.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_queries.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["query_graph filters by type/status/severity/scope","get_required_reads resolves spec required_reads JSON to nodes","walk_down BFS over implements/depends-on"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: log_finding + mark_criterion_satisfied
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convenience writes used by builder/spec-checker. log_finding auto-inherits scope; mark_criterion_satisfied requires evidence.

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/findings.py, tests/test_findings.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/findings.py","mcp-server/tests/test_findings.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_findings.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["log_finding inherits parent scope","explicit scope wins","invalid severity rejected","empty evidence rejected","out-of-range criterion index raises"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Falsifiability + feedback-loop validators
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hard gates: validate_criterion, validate_feedback_loop, validate_spec. Rejects hand-wavy language; requires runnable cmd / runtime signal + named fix path.

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/validators.py, tests/test_validators.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/validators.py","mcp-server/tests/test_validators.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_validators.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["rejects empty/short/handwave verify","accepts runnable command","accepts runtime signals","feedback loop needs signal AND fix path","validate_spec composes both"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Scope auto-inference
tasks.description:
**Goal:** infer_scope with priority order: explicit > parent_scope > body path mentions (LCP) > recent_files (LCP) > cwd basename > 'global'.

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/scope.py, tests/test_scope.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/scope.py","mcp-server/tests/test_scope.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_scope.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["explicit wins","parent_scope second","body path LCP third","recent_files LCP fourth","cwd basename fifth","global fallback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: stdio MCP server wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose 10 tools via stdio MCP. DB path from AGENTIC_DB_PATH env, defaults to ./.agentic/graph.db.

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/server.py, tests/test_server.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/server.py","mcp-server/tests/test_server.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_server.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["agentic-mcp script starts stdio server","all 10 tools listed with JSON schemas","create_node + get_node round-trip via stdio","validate_spec exposed and rejects bad spec"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Spec template with 3 worked examples
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Canonical Spec markdown template plus 3 examples (slugify, status command, sqlite-vec bug fix) that all pass validate_spec.

**Files:** templates/spec.md.

```json:metadata
{"files":["templates/spec.md"],"verifyCommand":"python -c (see plan task 10 step 2)","acceptanceCriteria":["all PRD spec fields present","3 examples (trivial/feature/bug)","all 3 examples pass validate_spec"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: skills/router/SKILL.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Entry-point skill describing the system and pointing at tools/skills/commands. Under 400 body lines. No cross-plugin references.

**Files:** skills/router/SKILL.md.

```json:metadata
{"files":["skills/router/SKILL.md"],"verifyCommand":"python -c (see plan task 11 verify block)","acceptanceCriteria":["frontmatter name: router","body <400 lines","names all 10 MCP tools","points at templates/spec.md and spec-writing skill","describes Phase 0 builder+spec-checker flow"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: skills/spec-writing/SKILL.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Spec-writing skill with embedded Socratic intent-clarification pass (5-8 questions). Phase 0 minimal. Under 250 body lines. No cross-plugin references.

**Files:** skills/spec-writing/SKILL.md.

```json:metadata
{"files":["skills/spec-writing/SKILL.md"],"verifyCommand":"python -c (see plan task 12 verify block)","acceptanceCriteria":["frontmatter name: spec-writing","body <250 lines","Socratic question list (5-8)","references templates/spec.md and validate_spec","no superpowers-extended-cc references"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Builder subagent (agents/builder.md)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Builder subagent with concise embedded TDD + systematic-debugging guidance. Under 200 lines. First action: get_required_reads + query_graph for open Criticals.

**Files:** agents/builder.md.

```json:metadata
{"files":["agents/builder.md"],"verifyCommand":"python -c (see plan task 13 verify block)","acceptanceCriteria":["frontmatter name: builder","body <200 lines","first action calls get_required_reads + query_graph","embedded TDD guidance","embedded debugging guidance","no cross-plugin refs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Spec-checker subagent (agents/spec-checker.md)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Spec-checker subagent. Context-isolated: only sees spec + artifact. Runs each criterion's verify, calls mark_criterion_satisfied with evidence on pass or log_finding(Critical) on fail. Under 150 lines.

**Files:** agents/spec-checker.md.

```json:metadata
{"files":["agents/spec-checker.md"],"verifyCommand":"python -c (see plan task 14 verify block)","acceptanceCriteria":["frontmatter name: spec-checker","body <150 lines","first action: get_node spec","per-criterion loop with mark/log_finding","explicit context-isolation discipline"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: SessionStart hook (PowerShell walk-up resolver)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PowerShell 5.1 hook that walks up from cwd looking for .agentic/, emits factual additionalContext JSON when found, silent when not. ASCII-only string literals; parse-checked.

**Files:** hooks/hooks.json, hooks/session-start.ps1, mcp-server/tests/test_walkup.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["hooks/hooks.json","hooks/session-start.ps1","mcp-server/tests/test_walkup.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_walkup.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["walks up closest wins","silent when no .agentic","JSON additionalContext with project root + graph stats","ASCII-only string literals","parses cleanly","4 walkup scenarios pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: /agentic:init command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Slash command that scaffolds .agentic/ at cwd, accepts scope mode (isolated/workspace/personal), initializes graph.db. Non-destructive on re-run.

**Files:** commands/init.md, mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/init_project.py, tests/test_init_project.py, modify pyproject.toml.

```json:metadata
{"files":["commands/init.md","mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/init_project.py","mcp-server/tests/test_init_project.py","mcp-server/pyproject.toml"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_init_project.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["creates .agentic/{graph.db,config.json,compatibility.json,specs/}","scope mode validated","re-run non-destructive"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 17: /agentic:detect-conflicts command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Informational-only command listing installed plugins, surfacing known overlaps (v1: Superpowers only), recording user preference in .agentic/compatibility.json. Never modifies another plugin.

**Files:** commands/detect-conflicts.md, mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/registry.py, conflicts.py, tests/test_conflicts.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["commands/detect-conflicts.md","mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/registry.py","mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/conflicts.py","mcp-server/tests/test_conflicts.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_conflicts.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["registry has superpowers-extended-cc only","detect finds fake plugin in temp dir","render text matches PRD template phrases","record_preference writes ONLY inside .agentic/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 18: /agentic:import-spec command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bridge for external plans. from_markdown parses criteria_json + feedback_loop, runs validate_spec, creates Spec node on pass or returns reasons on fail.

**Files:** commands/import-spec.md, mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/import_spec.py, tests/test_import_spec.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["commands/import-spec.md","mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/import_spec.py","mcp-server/tests/test_import_spec.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_import_spec.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["good spec imports and creates Spec node","bad spec rejected with reasons","bad spec creates NO node"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 19: End-to-end bootstrap test (Phase 0 exit gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run full flow on slugify(s) toy task: init project -> create Goal+Spec -> validate_spec passes -> run criteria -> mark_criterion_satisfied for each -> log Strength Finding -> reopen DB -> verify everything persists. This IS the Phase 0 exit gate test.

**Files:** mcp-server/tests/test_e2e_bootstrap.py.

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/tests/test_e2e_bootstrap.py"],"verifyCommand":"pytest mcp-server/tests/test_e2e_bootstrap.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["init_project + create nodes + validate_spec passes","spec-checker simulation runs verify cmds","all criteria marked satisfied","Strength Finding logged","DB closed and reopened proves persistence"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 20: Plan-coverage review + README + final commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm every Phase 0 PRD build item maps to a completed task. Update repo README. Full test suite green.

**Files:** README.md (modify).

```json:metadata
{"files":["README.md"],"verifyCommand":"cd mcp-server && pytest -v","acceptanceCriteria":["README explains project/phase/install/commands/spec template/plan location (references PRD v3 and GhostlyGawd/agentic-engineering)","every PRD Phase 0 build item maps to completed task","all tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 21: Push to GitHub as agentic-engineering
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create public repo github.com/GhostlyGawd/agentic-engineering and push everything. Verify fresh clone-and-install round-trip.

**Files:** none modified.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"gh repo view GhostlyGawd/agentic-engineering --json name,visibility,defaultBranchRef","acceptanceCriteria":["repo exists public on main with Phase 0 commits","origin remote points at it","fresh clone + pip install -e + pytest passes in temp dir","gh repo view returns expected manifest"]}
```
